name: Citrus Spinach Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon fresh lime juice (up to 2 tablespoons)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small screw-top jar, combine the lime juice, oil, sesame seeds, lime peel, and ginger. Cover and shake well.
2. Refrigerate until serving.
3. In a large bowl, combine the spinach, mushrooms, orange sections, and onion. Toss with the dressing.
4 servings.
Notes: Lime lovers will appreciate this snappy dressing. The touch of orange in this crisp salad adds a colorful bit of refreshment.
